##NAMES=Lipuite
##RRUFFID=R140946
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=KNa_8_Mn^3+^_5_Mg_0.5_[Si_12_O_30_(OH)_4_](PO_4_)O_2_(OH)_2_·4H_2_O
##LOCALITY=N'Chwaning III mine, Kalahari manganese field, Northern Cape Province, South Africa
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Jaco and Tania Janse van Nieuwenhuizen
##DESCRIPTION=Dark reddish brown massive crystalline, associated with sugilite (R130754). Type sample described in Gu et al (2019)
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R140946
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=K_1.11_Na_8.16_(Mn^3+^_4.86_Fe^3+^_0.14_)Mg_0.39_[Si_12.08_O_30_(OH)_4_](P_0.95_O_4_)O_2_(OH)_2_·4H_2_O
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.08 b: 12.222 c: 17.093 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 1887.7 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
